blended.narrative: Shawnee Peak is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 438 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.1" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 55°F.
